{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame territory
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] rose from the [[Blackflame territory]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
